caption: A large assembly of people, primarily men wearing white traditional Indian attire like kurtas, are seated in a tiered auditorium with light-colored wooden desks. The setting appears to be a legislative chamber, with rows of people facing forward toward an unseen focal point. Many individuals are seen talking to one another, while some look ahead or handle documents. A few individuals are dressed in different clothing, including a person in a blue uniform standing in the aisle and others in colorful sarees. The scene remains virtually static across the sequence, with only minor shifts in the postures and head positions of the attendees as they interact. There are no visible logos or on-screen text. The lighting is bright and consistent throughout the wide-angle shot of the crowded hall.
